---
title: "Margin Figure Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['#notefigure\(']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This tests a basic figure placed in the margin.

![A margin figure](test-image.png){#fig-margin .column-margin width=100%}

See @fig-margin for the figure in the margin.

More text in the main column to show the layout.
